summary_en: Year-end dividend for FY6/26 raised ¥15/share to ¥70/share (from ¥55 forecast August 2025). Annual total now ¥125/share. Based on stated policy: DOE 6% or payout ratio 50%, whichever is larger.
title_en: Notice Regarding Revision of Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase)
translation_en_brief:
Ai Holdings Corporation announced on 15 May 2026 a revision to its year-end dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending June 2026. The year-end dividend per share is being increased by ¥15 to ¥70/share, from the prior forecast of ¥55/share issued on 19 August 2025. This brings the full-year dividend to ¥125/share (comprising ¥55 interim + ¥70 year-end).

The increase is justified under the company's stated dividend policy, disclosed on 16 February 2026, which targets the larger of: (i) a dividend-on-equity (DOE) of 6% of shareholder capital, or (ii) a payout ratio of 50%. Given that current fiscal performance is tracking broadly in line with plan, management has decided to increase shareholder returns within this framework. Prior-year full dividend was ¥100/share (¥45 interim + ¥55 year-end for FY6/25).
